Welcome to JHPS Gaya

Our school is nestled in the verdent splendour at a specious and sufficient place for sooting and sweet environment of teaching. The accomodation is sufficient and satisfactory. Children can enjoy all the modern facilities and felicities.

Teacher employed here are young, smart zelious and well curious to impart creative and qualified education for the children.Teachers are well vesed and expert in ...... Read More

Scheme of education

School provides education mainly through english medium.Aim of the school is not only to provide theoretical education but it also will provide Practical, Mental, Physical, Social, Economical, Psychological and spritual education

“Our School discipline has two main goals first is to ensure the safety of students, and other is to create an environment conducive to learning.”

Academic Subject

  • English
  • Maths
  • G.K.
  • Environmental studies
  • Hindi
  • Computer

Co-Curricular Activity

  • Drawing
  • Colouring
  • Cut work
  • Clay Modeling
  • Guided and free play
  • Dance

Fascility

  • Laboratory
  • Library
  • Computer Education
  • Spoken English
  • Coaching for slow learner
  • Dedicated group of teachers
